description: Eval prompts for Seedance 2.0 video prompt generation skill

evals.name: timestamp-short-video
evals.prompt: 帮我写一段 15 秒的视频提示词：一只橘猫从沙发上醒来，伸懒腰，然后跳到窗台上看窗外的雨。竖屏 9:16，治愈风格。
evals.notes: Tests pure-text generation with timestamp storyboard structure for a 15s video. Should produce time-segmented prompt with camera movements, sound effects, and atmosphere.

evals.name: multimodal-product-ad
evals.prompt: 我有一张产品图（一款白色陶瓷咖啡杯），想做一个 10 秒的产品展示广告。需要从纯黑背景中旋转出场，展示杯身纹理细节，最后杯中倒入热咖啡冒出蒸汽。横屏 16:9，极简高级感。产品正面图作为 @图片1，杯身纹理细节图作为 @图片2。
evals.notes: Tests multi-modal prompt with @图片 references. Should correctly assign @图片1/@图片2, use orbit/zoom camera work, and follow the basic structure for <=12s videos.

evals.name: long-video-segmented
evals.prompt: 帮我做一段 30 秒的视频：一个宇航员漂浮在空间站内，透过舷窗看到地球日出。前半段是空间站内的失重环境，后半段是地球日出的壮观景象。横屏 2.35:1，科幻史诗风格，8K品质。
evals.notes: Tests >15s video requiring segmented generation + extension strategy. Should produce 2-segment plan with segment 1 (normal generation <=15s) and segment 2 (video extension), including connection points between segments.
